<!--
Thanks for contributing to Meetropolis! Please fill out the sections below.
Make sure you have signed off every commit (`git commit --signoff`); the
DCO check will block the merge otherwise. See CONTRIBUTING.md for details.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] fix — a bug fix
- [ ] feat — a new feature
- [ ] refactor — a code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] perf — a code change that improves performance
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] chore — build, dependencies, CI, tooling
- [ ] test — adding or correcting tests

## Affected components

- [ ] `apps/server`
- [ ] `apps/web`
- [ ] `apps/npc-service`
- [ ] `apps/loadtest`
- [ ] `packages/shared`
- [ ] Repository root / build / docs

## How was this tested?

<!--
Describe how you validated the change locally. For UI changes, include
screenshots or a short clip. For server/protocol changes, mention which
test suites you ran.
-->

## Breaking changes

- [ ] This PR introduces a breaking change (and the migration path is
      described in the description or the CHANGELOG).
- [ ] This PR is backwards-compatible.

## Licensing checklist

- [ ] All commits are signed off (`git commit --signoff`).
- [ ] I understand and agree to the inbound license grant described in
      `CONTRIBUTING.md` — the maintainer may also relicense my contribution
      under the Meetropolis Commercial License.
- [ ] If this PR adds a new runtime dependency, I have noted its license
      and confirmed it is compatible with both AGPL-3.0 and MIT.

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123", "Refs #456" -->
